propositions: Removed config keys leave stale references across docs, CLI help text, and release notes that must be purged.
A repo-wide grep for each removed key name must return zero stale references in docs, markdown, and CLI help.
Docs describing now-hardcoded behaviors must no longer describe a config toggle while retaining documentation of kept tuning params.
docs/config.md must match the pruned schema exactly, listing only keys that still exist.
CLI help and golden help fixtures must be regenerated and kept consistent.
This is a docs-only accuracy sweep with no behavior change, closing after removal stories land.
